title: Update Collection List Request
description: Request parameters for updating an existing collection list

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

list_id.description: ID of the collection list to update

account.description: Account that owns the list. Required when the authenticated agent has access to multiple accounts; optional otherwise.

base_collections.description: Complete replacement for the base collections list (not a patch). Each entry is a discriminated union: distribution_ids (platform-independent identifiers), publisher_collections (publisher_domain + collection_ids), or publisher_genres (publisher_domain + genres).

filters.description: Complete replacement for the filters (not a patch)

brand.description: Update brand reference. Resolved to full brand identity at execution time.

webhook_url.description: Update the webhook URL for list change notifications (set to empty string to remove). Governance agents MUST validate this URL against SSRF per docs/building/implementation/security#webhook-url-validation-ssrf.

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated unique key for at-most-once execution. If a request with the same key has already been processed, the server returns the original response without re-processing. MUST be unique per (seller, request) pair to prevent cross-seller correlation. Use a fresh UUID v4 for each request.
